accurate.why: All claims match bill text; correctly cites Fed. Reg. and GAO letter.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states this is a CRA disapproval of the SEC's SAB 121 rule.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers disapproval, Fed. Reg. cite, GAO opinion, and operative effect.

correct_entities.why: SEC, GAO, and Congressional Review Act correctly named.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 21015, April 11, 2022, and Oct. 31, 2023 GAO letter accurately cited per bill text.
